"}, {"text": "An individual purchase order can have a maximum of 2,000 orderlines."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To import purchase orders into Neto:"}]}, {"type": If you're using an existing template you'll be able to change and save any mapping before you proceed."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Unique Identifiers"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These fields determine how Neto will identify the product order lines, locations (warehouses) the purchase order is for and suppliers in your CSV file. Mapping these fields will let you draw information from the products and suppliers in the other sections of the mapping. They also determine how many purchase orders will be created."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If the "}, {"text": "Supplier", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Location", "bold": true}, {"text": " information is different for any order lines, separate purchase orders will be created."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Notes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock keeping unit. Unique identifier for the product in Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Only one of Product SKU, Product ID and Product supplier SKU is required in your file."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product ID"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ID of the product assigned by Neto automatically. The purchase order will be created for this location/warehouse."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "			Can be taken from the primary warehouse in Neto or on each product."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Only one of Location ID and Location reference is required in your file."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Location reference"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The unique location/ref of the warehouse in Neto.
